title: Bizzy Write and Present
description:
Good job getting in a project for your team!

Recall that part of your grade is not only the final project, but each person's contribution.

EACH PERSON in a group will complete the attached rubric.

If you do not review your team members, you will receive a ZERO.

You may earn up to 10 points on this. Your points will be based on an average of team member responses.

Name your File, YourName_CASENAME

Review of Group Form.xlsx Download Review of Group Form.xlsx

You may earn up to 10 points on this. Your points will be based on an average of team member responses.
